mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_type = 'folder' AND r.parent_id IS NULL AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_uuid = #{resourceUuid} AND r.resource_type = 'folder' AND r.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_uuid = #{resourceUuid} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_uuid = #{resourceUuid} AND r.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.parent_id = #{parentId} AND r.is_deleted = 0
AND r.name_normalized LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT id, resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM resources WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN resource_type = 'folder' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, name_normalized ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources (resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{resourceUuid}, #{spaceId}, NULL, 'folder', #{name}, #{nameNormalized}, NULL, 0, NULL, #{pathCache}, #{ownerUserId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM resources WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources (resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{resourceUuid}, #{spaceId}, #{parentId}, 'file', #{name}, #{nameNormalized}, #{extension}, #{sizeBytes}, #{objectId}, #{pathCache}, #{ownerUserId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO resources (resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{resourceUuid}, #{spaceId}, #{parentId}, 'folder', #{name}, #{nameNormalized}, NULL, 0, NULL, #{pathCache}, #{ownerUserId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE resources SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, name_normalized = #{nameNormalized}, path_cache = #{pathCache}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE resources SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, name_normalized = #{nameNormalized}, path_cache = #{pathCache}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resources SET name = #{name}, name_normalized = #{nameNormalized}, path_cache = #{pathCache}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE resources SET path_cache = CONCAT(#{newPrefix}, SUBSTRING(path_cache, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)), updated_at = NOW() WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND path_cache LIKE CONCAT(#{oldPrefix}, '%')

UPDATE resources SET path_cache = CONCAT(#{newPrefix}, SUBSTRING(path_cache, CHAR_LENGTH(#{oldPrefix}) + 1)), updated_at = NOW() WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND path_cache LIKE CONCAT(#{oldPrefix}, '%')
UPDATE resources SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE resources SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND path_cache LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%')
UPDATE resources SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
UPDATE resources SET is_deleted = 0, deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND is_deleted = 1 AND path_cache LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT id, resource_id, space_id, deleted_by_user_id, original_parent_id, deleted_at, purge_at, restored_at, created_at FROM recycle_entries WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND restored_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recycle_entries (resource_id, space_id, deleted_by_user_id, original_parent_id, deleted_at, purge_at, restored_at, created_at) VALUES (#{resourceId}, #{spaceId}, #{deletedByUserId}, #{originalParentId}, NOW(), #{purgeAt}, NULL, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE recycle_entries SET restored_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND restored_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_type = 'folder' AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.parent_id ASC, r.name_normalized ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM recycle_entries e INNER JOIN resources r ON r.id = e.resource_id INNER JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND e.restored_at IS NULL AND r.is_deleted = 1
AND r.name_normalized LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT r.resource_uuid FROM recycle_entries e INNER JOIN resources r ON r.id = e.resource_id INNER JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND e.restored_at IS NULL AND r.is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY e.deleted_at ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r WHERE r.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND r.is_deleted = 1
AND (r.id = #{rootId} OR r.path_cache LIKE CONCAT(#{folderPathPrefix}, '%'))
AND r.id = #{rootId}
ORDER BY CHAR_LENGTH(r.path_cache) DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM recycle_entries WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND restored_at IS NULL

DELETE FROM resource_acl WHERE resource_id IN
#{id}

DELETE FROM share_resources WHERE resource_id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE upload_sessions SET parent_resource_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE parent_resource_id IN
#{id}
